label: Maximize colonist survival
description: Team should maximize survivability of arriving colonists.

label: House validity
description: A house is valid only if geometry, enclosure, airlock, floorspace, and aesthetics requirements are satisfied.

label: House support dependency
description: A house contributes only when connected to food and water resources.

label: Greenhouse validity
description: A greenhouse is valid only if soil, geometry, air gap, and glass-cover rules are satisfied.

label: Greenhouse support dependency
description: A greenhouse contributes only when watered and connected to housing.

label: Water generator validity
description: A water generator is valid only if foundation, water stack, and cap requirements are satisfied.

label: Water generator support limit
description: A water generator supports a maximum of two directly connected structures with output split evenly.

label: Connectors required for resource flow
description: Food and water resources only flow when proper connectors are present.

label: Direct connection only
description: Resources cannot be passed through one structure to another.

label: Layout spacing
description: All structures must be placed at least 6 studs apart.

label: Phase 1 colony target
description: The colony should support 50 civilians in phase 1.

label: Phase 2 colony target
description: The colony should support 40 civilians and 20 VIPs in phase 2.

label: Resource movement cost
description: Resources require time/effort to move from piles to work sites.
